title: You as structure
literal: For a convex polyhedron, vertices, edges, and faces satisfy Euler’s formula V − E + F = 2.
human: A self can be seen as a whole made of distinct parts in relationship; the shape is real because the connections are real.
validity: Strong mathematical validity; metaphorical reading is interpretive.
guardrail: Do not treat the metaphor as a claim about geometry or identity being literally equivalent.

title: Communion scales combinatorially
literal: The number of unique pairwise relationships among N nodes is N(N−1)/2.
human: Connection grows by pairing: the more lives in a system, the more relational possibilities emerge.
validity: Strong mathematical validity; metaphor is structurally apt.
guardrail: The formula counts unordered pairs, not the quality of those relationships.

title: Stewardship is costly
literal: A local decrease in entropy requires energy input and does not contradict the second law when the full system is considered.
human: Care, order, and maintenance take work; keeping something alive, organized, or meaningful is never free.
validity: Physically valid with context; metaphor is strong.
guardrail: Never imply that entropy can decrease in an isolated system without accounting for the environment.

title: Legacy as persistence
literal: This is a limit expression: time is imagined as increasing without bound.
human: Legacy asks what of a person continues to matter as time stretches beyond direct observation.
validity: Mathematically valid as a limit; human meaning is metaphorical.
guardrail: Not all systems persist; legacy is about pattern continuation, not guaranteed permanence.

title: Presence contains capacity
literal: Mass and energy are equivalent in relativity; mass can be converted to energy and vice versa in physical processes.
human: A person’s existence carries real capacity to affect the world; presence is not nothing.
validity: Scientifically valid; metaphor should remain clearly symbolic.
guardrail: Do not infer unlimited personal power or use this as medical/psychological proof.

title: Wholeness from accumulation
literal: An antiderivative F is related to the integral of f, up to a constant C.
human: Small moments accumulate into the shape of a life; the whole is built from many local choices.
validity: Mathematically valid; metaphor is widely understandable.
guardrail: The constant of integration is a mathematical family of solutions, not a mystical origin statement.
